hist-tier1-intro.label: Tier 1 Intro: Foundational Historical Knowledge
hist-tier1-intro.note: One course from HIST 101–104 or HONR 101–102

hist-tier2-intro.label: Tier 2 Intro: Historical Knowledge
hist-tier2-intro.note: One course from HIST 208–213 or approved honors alternative

hist-premodern.label: Pre-Modern History
hist-premodern.note: One 300-level course in pre-modern history (e.g., HIST 310, 314, 315)

hist-modern-european.label: Modern European History
hist-modern-european.note: One 300-level course in modern European history (e.g., HIST 320, 330, 337)

hist-us.label: U.S. History
hist-us.note: One 300-level course in U.S. history (e.g., HIST 360, 363, 367, 380)

hist-world.label: World History
hist-world.note: One 300-level course in world/non-Western history (e.g., HIST 341, 350, 356)

hist-electives.label: History Electives
hist-electives.note: Five additional history courses (HIST 101–399 or approved related courses); one may be HIST 398 Internship
